name: pipto
description: Pipto is a JSON-native presentation workspace with a marketing website, an interactive playground, and publishable packages for schema validation, PPTX export/import, preview, and theme transforms.

scripts.dev:libs: pnpm -r --parallel --stream --filter json2pptx-schema --filter json2pptx --filter ppt2json --filter pptx-previewer --filter pptx-custom run dev:watch
scripts.dev:workspace: pnpm -r --parallel --stream --filter json2ppt-playground --filter json2pptx-schema --filter json2pptx --filter ppt2json --filter pptx-previewer --filter pptx-custom run dev:watch
scripts.predev: pnpm -C packages/json2pptx-schema build && pnpm -C packages/json2pptx build && pnpm -C packages/pptx2json build && pnpm -C packages/pptx-previewer build && pnpm -C packages/pptx-custom build
scripts.prebuild: pnpm -C packages/json2pptx-schema install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm -C packages/json2pptx-schema build && pnpm -C packages/json2pptx install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm -C packages/json2pptx build && pnpm -C packages/pptx2json install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm -C packages/pptx2json build && pnpm -C packages/pptx-previewer install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm -C packages/pptx-previewer build && pnpm -C packages/pptx-custom install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm -C packages/pptx-custom build
scripts.build: pnpm run build:playground && pnpm run build:website
